film.title: Why Stop Now?
film.overview: When a college piano prodigy tries to check his mother into rehab, he is taken hostage by her drug dealer and swept along on a wild adventure.

dialogues.dialogue: - Checking in.  - Fill this out. Fill that up.  You should be really proud of your son.  It takes a lot of courage to walk in that door.  - Mighty proud.
dialogues.cause_raw: showing courage to walk in the door

dialogues.dialogue: You should be really proud of your son.  It takes a lot of courage to walk in that door.  - Mighty proud.  Wait outside for me, baby?  - Okay.
- Why? Who am I?  - My son.  Go make your mother proud.  - This is ridiculous.  - Ah, ya f*****' door!
Get yourself in the car.  You talked such good Spanish with him, sweetie.  I was so proud. Okay.  - Oh, s**t, yo, this really hurts.  - You know, I've got some Motrin in here somewhere.
Oh, bravo!  - Mom, what the hell are you doing here?  - I am so proud.  - I think you need some help. - No, no.  - Don't worry. I'll get help.
I don't want that to get in your way.  I don't want it to stop you.  I'm so proud of you, huh?  Oh, you played beautifully today.  - Thank you.
- No. Congratulations.  - Yeah.  - I'm proud of you.  You know, you can be proud of yourself.  - Okay.
- Yeah.  - I'm proud of you.  You know, you can be proud of yourself.  - Okay.  I am.
